parameters.content:
## Notes -   Lead  Generation (Phase - 1)        

1. first step to schedule a trigger to start. 

2. SerApi is used third party which fetch google data APi with  less configuration and less complexity but gives output in 1 item all in JSON output how APi talks to system.

3. merge node to merge all leads. 

4. code node  in js as the lead is dynamically different like text phone and to categorize as well the data that makes into real CRM based system as phone address status which normal APi fetching can not do it . like also fixing cafe as name pubs as category 

5. i connect google sheets node append version so it can add accordingly with field which add in json formate as n8n works in json formate as well as to dynamically adjust

nodes.name: Append row in sheet ( Leads added)

parameters.content:
## Lead processing (Phase - 2 )

1 . schedule trigger to start 

2. fetch leads to read the leads via get rows to mainly update

3. code node in js just to filter the update status is contacting and attempting +1 like that . 

4 . finaly staus is contacting attempting call 
+1 will show via update operation sheets

## Twillio Calling ( Phase - 3 )
 
1. Webhook used for real time workflow made a file in python test_data to connect with fake lead .

2. if node for true if call gets connected  

3 . twilio node for call used free trial twilio used my number for testing and twilio international number .
4. sheet updated with status as contacted and notes to submit.

## Testing Data 

1. manual trigger node for starting the worflow 

2. edit fields to add secific field with json accordingly.

3.  code in js to process leads to update as we didi in production one 

4. Append in sheet to add test data.

parameters.message: Hi, this is Ayush from Ninjacart. We work with cafes and pubs in Bangalore for sourcing premium fruits like avocado, berries, and imported items. This is just a quick business check  we don’t ask for any payments or sensitive details.  Is this a good time to talk?

## Twilio Whatsapp (Phase - 4 )
1. same process 

2. same if node for false if call not connected 

3 . call not connected used twilio whatsapp sandbox for sending the message 

4. same updated sheet with last contacted and notes not contacted .
